message:
perf(python): release GIL during shortest path computations

Add py.allow_threads() wrappers around all shortest_path algorithm
calls in the Python binding layer — shortest_path_unweighted,
shortest_path_weighted, bellman_ford_shortest_paths, and their
directed variants. This releases the Python GIL during the Rust
computation, allowing other Python threads to run concurrently
during graph traversal.

Thread the Python<'_> token through compute_single_shortest_path
and compute_single_shortest_path_directed helper functions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
